□ X X X X
□ X □ □ X
□ X X X X
□ □ □ □ □

Generate the referring expression starting with the tag "Expression: " for the given target grid. Omit any other text.

action.content: Expression: The grid with an X in the bottom-left corner (row 5, column 1) and an X in the middle-right area (row 4, column 4), where the fourth row has exactly one X that is not at either end.
action.label: response

action.content:

**Second grid:**

- Fourth row has exactly one X that is not at either end: Row 4 is □ □ □ X □ - one X at column 4 (not at column 1 or 5) ✓
